response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior engineer, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8–12 years of deep C++/STL, multi-threaded, message-broker, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) experience. Bogdan's C/C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; the rest of his 13+ year career is in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js. There is no evidence of MQTT, Modbus/OPC UA, IEC 62443/SDL, or industrial automation background, making him a poor technical fit despite strong general engineering credentials.
strengths: Long, varied senior-level engineering career with full-stack, backend, and embedded exposure
Solid background in distributed/high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby microservices, GIS platform on Kubernetes)
Demonstrated mentoring, workshop delivery, and TDD/agile craftsmanship practices
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only a brief NI role over a decade ago
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or OT-protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) experience
No MQTT or message-broker-based large-scale system experience evident in the resume
